scenes.npcDialog: The Hollywood Sign is best from Griffith Observatory! Built in 1923 for real estate ads. Each letter is 45 feet tall. Best photos at golden hour!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 할리우드 사인은 그리피스 천문대에서 제일 잘 보여요! 1923년 부동산 광고로 세워졌어요. 각 글자가 45피트예요. 골든아워에 사진 최고!

choices.text: 45 feet per letter! It's bigger than I imagined.
Built for real estate? That's funny history!
It's just letters on a hill.
I can see it in movies.

scenes.npcDialog: Walk of Fame has over 2,700 stars! Look for your favorite celebrity. The stars are for movies, TV, music, radio, and theater. Any favorites?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 명예의 거리에 2,700개 넘는 별이 있어요! 좋아하는 유명인 찾아보세요. 영화, TV, 음악, 라디오, 연극 별이에요. 좋아하는 사람 있어요?

choices.text: 2,700 stars! Where's Michael Jackson's star?
I want to find my favorite actor's star!
It's just stars on the ground.
I don't follow celebrities.

scenes.npcDialog: Santa Monica Pier! The Ferris wheel is solar-powered. Ride the carousel from 1922. Pacific Park has rollercoasters! And the beach is right there!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 산타모니카 피어예요! 대관람차가 태양광이에요. 1922년 회전목마 타보세요. 퍼시픽 파크에 롤러코스터! 바로 옆이 해변이에요!

choices.text: Solar-powered Ferris wheel! Very California.
A carousel from 1922! Is it the original?
Piers are all the same.
Amusement rides are for kids.

scenes.npcDialog: In-N-Out is a California icon! Try the Double-Double. Ask for Animal Style - special sauce, grilled onions, extra pickles. Secret menu!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 인앤아웃은 캘리포니아 상징이에요! 더블더블 드셔보세요. 애니멀 스타일로 - 특제 소스, 그릴드 어니언, 피클 추가. 시크릿 메뉴예요!

choices.text: Animal Style! I love secret menu items.
Double-Double sounds perfect. What's in it?
Fast food is unhealthy.
I prefer McDonald's.

scenes.npcDialog: Universal Studios Hollywood! The studio tour shows real film sets. Harry Potter, Jurassic World, The Simpsons - which world first?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 유니버설 스튜디오 할리우드! 스튜디오 투어에서 실제 영화 세트를 봐요. 해리포터, 쥬라기 월드, 심슨 - 어느 세계 먼저요?

choices.text: Harry Potter first! I want to try butterbeer!
The studio tour with real sets sounds amazing!
Theme parks are too crowded.
I'm too old for theme parks.

scenes.npcDialog: Venice Beach is LA's eccentric side! Muscle Beach gym, street performers, Abbot Kinney shops. The boardwalk has amazing people watching!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베니스 비치는 LA의 별난 면이에요! 머슬 비치 짐, 거리 공연자, 애벗 키니 상점들. 보드워크에서 사람 구경 끝내줘요!

choices.text: Muscle Beach! I've seen it in so many movies.
Venice looks so creative and free-spirited!
Venice seems too weird.
I prefer quiet beaches.

scenes.npcDialog: Getty Center is free! Van Gogh, Monet, Rembrandt. The architecture by Richard Meier is stunning. Take the tram up - great city views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 게티 센터는 무료예요! 반 고흐, 모네, 렘브란트. 리처드 마이어 건축이 끝내줘요. 트램 타고 올라가요 - 시티 뷰 좋아요!

choices.text: Free admission with Van Gogh! This is amazing!
The building looks like a work of art itself.
Art museums are boring.
Free means low quality.

scenes.npcDialog: LA has the best tacos outside Mexico! Al pastor, carnitas, or carne asada? Cilantro, onion, lime, and salsa verde. Street tacos are the real deal!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA에 멕시코 밖 최고 타코가 있어요! 알 파스토르, 카르니타스, 카르네 아사다? 고수, 양파, 라임, 살사 베르데. 스트릿 타코가 진짜예요!

choices.text: Al pastor please! I love pineapple with pork.
Street tacos! What makes LA tacos special?
Food trucks seem unsanitary.
I don't like Mexican food.

scenes.npcDialog: Rodeo Drive is luxury central! Chanel, Gucci, Louis Vuitton. Window shopping is free! The Pretty Woman bench is here for photos.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로데오 드라이브는 럭셔리 중심지! 샤넬, 구찌, 루이비통. 아이쇼핑은 무료예요! 귀여운 여인 벤치에서 사진 찍어요.

choices.text: Pretty Woman was filmed here! Where's the bench?
Window shopping is fun! The displays are art.
Luxury brands are overpriced.
I can't afford anything here.

scenes.npcDialog: Griffith Observatory has the best LA views! Free entry, free telescopes at night. The planetarium shows are awesome. Stay for sunset and city lights!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그리피스 천문대 LA 전망 최고예요! 무료 입장, 밤에 무료 망원경. 플라네타리움 쇼 끝내줘요. 일몰과 야경까지 있어요!

choices.text: Free telescopes! Can I see the Hollywood Sign too?
Sunset to city lights - I'll stay the whole evening!
Observatories are for scientists.
I can see the city from anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: The Grove has everything! Farmers Market since 1934. Korean BBQ tacos, acai bowls, LA's best donuts. Fusion food was invented here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 더 그로브에 다 있어요! 1934년부터 파머스 마켓. 한국식 BBQ 타코, 아사이볼, LA 최고 도넛. 퓨전 푸드가 여기서 탄생했어요!

choices.text: Korean BBQ tacos! Only in LA!
Farmers Market since 1934! What's the must-try?
Fusion food isn't authentic.
Food halls are confusing.

scenes.npcDialog: Disneyland - the original! Walt Disney walked these streets. Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge is incredible. The fireworks show is magical!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 디즈니랜드 - 원조예요! 월트 디즈니가 이 거리를 걸었어요. 스타워즈: 갤럭시스 엣지가 대단해요. 불꽃놀이 쇼가 마법 같아요!

choices.text: The original Disneyland! What ride should I do first?
Galaxy's Edge! Can I build my own lightsaber?
Disney is too commercial.
Theme parks are exhausting.

scenes.npcDialog: Malibu is celebrity beach! Drive Pacific Coast Highway for amazing views. Zuma Beach is beautiful. You might spot movie stars!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 말리부는 셀럽 해변이에요! 퍼시픽 코스트 하이웨이 드라이브 경치 끝내줘요. 주마 비치가 예뻐요. 영화배우 볼 수도 있어요!

choices.text: PCH drive! I've seen it in so many movies.
Celebrity spotting would be exciting!
Beaches are all the same.
I don't care about celebrities.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! A car is essential in LA. Compact or SUV? GPS included. Convertible for the PCH? Remember - traffic is real, plan extra time!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! LA에서 차는 필수예요. 컴팩트? SUV? GPS 포함이에요. PCH 드라이브에 컨버터블? 기억하세요 - 교통체증 심하니까 시간 여유 두세요!

choices.text: Convertible for the coast! Perfect for LA.
How bad is the traffic really?
I'll just use Uber.
Driving is stressful.

scenes.npcDialog: Warner Bros Studio Tour! See Friends Central Perk, Batman sets, Harry Potter props. You might see actual filming! Very exclusive experience.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 워너 브라더스 스튜디오 투어! 프렌즈 센트럴 퍼크, 배트맨 세트, 해리포터 소품 봐요. 실제 촬영 볼 수도 있어요! 아주 특별한 경험이에요.

choices.text: Central Perk! Can I sit on the couch?
Actual filming! Do we need to be quiet?
Studio tours are just walking.
I've seen enough movies.

scenes.npcDialog: LA Koreatown is the largest outside Korea! Our KBBQ is 24 hours. Unlimited meat and banchan. Soju? This is like Seoul!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA 코리아타운이 한국 외 최대예요! 저희 한국 BBQ는 24시간이에요. 무한리필 고기와 반찬. 소주요? 여기가 서울 같아요!

choices.text: 24-hour KBBQ! Only in Koreatown.
Feels like Seoul! What banchan do you have?
Why eat Korean food in America?
BBQ is too smoky.

scenes.npcDialog: Dodger Stadium is baseball heaven! Hot dogs, Dodger Dogs are famous. Get there early for batting practice. The sunset over the field is iconic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 다저 스타디움은 야구 천국이에요! 핫도그, 다저 도그가 유명해요. 배팅 연습 보려면 일찍 가세요. 경기장 위 일몰이 아이콘이에요!

choices.text: Dodger Dogs! That's the true baseball experience.
Sunset at the stadium sounds beautiful!
Baseball is too slow.
I don't follow American sports.

scenes.npcDialog: Melrose is LA's hippest street! Vintage shops, sneaker stores, and the famous Paul Smith pink wall. Perfect for Instagram. Very LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 멜로즈는 LA에서 가장 힙한 거리예요! 빈티지숍, 스니커즈 가게, 유명한 폴 스미스 핑크 벽. 인스타그램 딱이에요. 아주 LA다워요!

choices.text: The pink wall! I've seen it everywhere on Instagram.
Vintage and sneakers? My kind of shopping!
Hipster areas are too try-hard.
I don't care about Instagram.

scenes.npcDialog: Hollywood Bowl is iconic! Outdoor amphitheater under the stars. Bring a picnic! Classical, rock, pop - everyone plays here. Only in LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 할리우드 볼은 아이콘이에요! 별 아래 야외 원형극장. 피크닉 가져오세요! 클래식, 록, 팝 - 모두가 여기서 공연해요. LA에서만!

choices.text: Picnic at a concert! That's so California.
Under the stars! What's playing tonight?
Outdoor venues have bad sound.
I prefer indoor concerts.

scenes.npcDialog: Your last LA sunset! California cuisine - fresh, local, healthy. Fish tacos, craft cocktails, and that ocean view. See you again soon - this is LA!
scenes.npcDialogKo: LA 마지막 일몰이네요! 캘리포니아 요리 - 신선하고, 로컬, 건강해요. 피쉬 타코, 크래프트 칵테일, 그 오션 뷰. 또 오세요 - 여기가 LA예요!

choices.text: Perfect way to end the trip! I'll miss this view.
Fish tacos at sunset - so California!
Healthy food is bland.
I prefer traditional restaurants.
